title: finish dia is_northmarq de-contamination — all-comps re-check + held removes
status: APPLIED LIVE 2026-06-10 (Scott-gated). Gate extended the strip to 62 (the 61 below + 13289 Sam Bretz, null-price, Scott-confirmed non-NM). Receipt: is_northmarq 428->366; buyside 22 unchanged; src salesforce_comp=194; curated listing median 6.31% (n296) unchanged; raw 6.41%. 3 outside names recorded known-non-NM in sf-nm-classifier.js.

source.side_source: sf_deal_export (Direct_Co_Broke) is ABSENT in this container (gitignored data.xlsx) — bucket-2 surfacers cannot be buy-side-reconciled here; they are KEPT as listing-side (their current state). gov untouched.

matcher: established tolerant gate: state + sold_date +/-120d + sold_price +/-6%; confirm city OR tenant-first-token OR <=25mi geocoded proximity (city-centroid gazetteer from geocoded properties). ALL-COMPS re-check = test each flagged sale against EVERY Internal-Sold comp (NOT the 1:1 winner).

universe.note: sale_id 13289 (Sam Bretz, Arvada CO) has NULL sold_price -> cannot be matcher-verified -> HELD (not stripped).

safeguard_all_comps_recheck.purpose: The strict 1:1 matcher STARVED real NM comps into the remove bucket (e.g. 8327 Austintown, 13137 Ripley) because their comp was claimed by a higher-ranked sale. The all-comps re-check rescues any flagged sale that matches ANY Internal comp under the tolerant gate -> KEEP.
safeguard_all_comps_recheck.finding: 101 rows surface (NOT 'a few') — the 1:1 pass would have wrongly stripped up to 101 genuine NM comps. MANY surfacers carry null/'None' brokers, so a broker-only classification would have removed them; the comp match is what proves they are real NM deals. This is exactly the false-positive-removal the safeguard exists to prevent.

held_set_partition._comment: held = the ~211 flagged-but-1:1-unmatched set (here 208 = 427 flagged - 219 matched-1:1). Partitioned three ways.

bucket_3_strip.rule: is_northmarq=true AND matches NO Internal comp under the all-comps re-check AND listing/procuring broker carries NO NM token (northmarq|stan johnson|briggs|sjc|stinson|gartman). These are the R23 broker-string false-positives.

flag_for_scott_within_strip._comment: Proposed strips, but borderline — Scott should confirm they are NOT NM before the gate. Remove any from the IN-list to hold.
flag_for_scott_within_strip.5429: ph: peranich & huffman (Harvey LA) — R74c flagged P&H 'object if NM'; 5420 P&H already routed buy-side.
flag_for_scott_within_strip.988: ph: peranich & huffman (Harvey LA) — same firm as above.
flag_for_scott_within_strip.7980: Nathan Huffman (Pearland TX, $4.78M, 2026) — 'Huffman' may be the P&H principal.
flag_for_scott_within_strip.8483: Sam Bretz (Arvada CO, $5.35M, 2026) — paired with held orphan 13289 (also Sam Bretz, null price).

bucket_1_nm_keep.action: NO WRITE — NM/SJC listing broker is NM-listed by Scott's rule (the guard).

bucket_2_surfacers.action: KEEP is_northmarq=true; tag is_northmarq_source='salesforce_comp' (comp-confirmed). Buy-side reconciliation deferred (no Deal export in container).

evidence_examples.note: named Austintown comp the 1:1 pass starved — now protected by the all-comps re-check

held_other.13289: Sam Bretz, Arvada CO, NULL sold_price — HELD (no price to matcher-verify).

nm_individuals_correctly_protected.422: SJC; Butler (Birmingham AL) — SJC token; also comp-matches Fresenius-Birmingham. KEPT.
nm_individuals_correctly_protected.5191: Will Lightfoot (Edmond OK) — named NM individual; comp-matches Fresenius-Edmond. KEPT.
nm_individuals_correctly_protected.8858: SJC; Scrivner (Neenah WI) — SJC token. KEPT.

post_strip_impact.curated_median_invariant_to_strip: TRUE — all 61 strips are comp-UNMATCHED, so they are not in the curated NM-comp median by construction. The deck #20 basis (R74c: Internal-comp median 6.34-6.40%) is untouched.
post_strip_impact.verdict: #20 listing median holds ~6.40% (raw moves 6.45 -> 6.41, toward the deck; curated unchanged at 6.31/n296).

guardrails_honored: Flag-column + is_northmarq_source provenance only — no price/term/cap writes.
Idempotent on sale_id (UPDATEs set fixed values).
Never strip an NM-token listing/procuring broker (verified: 0 of 61 carry a token).
Never strip a row that matches any Internal comp (verified: 0 of 61 match even under the looser city-OR-tenant gate).
gov untouched. Rows already source-tagged this round (e.g. 5004) untouched.
Orphan/null-price + borderline P&H/Huffman/Bretz rows surfaced for Scott, not bulk-stripped.
